ksa_text: Knowledge of AI conformity assessment and compliance lifecycle management, including conformity assessment procedures, CE marking requirements, notified body engagement, post-market surveillance obligations, and AI value chain liability triggers.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-013 (AI Governance/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.526, highest: EU AI Act at 0.526). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Metadata management and catalog strategy: technical/business/operational metadata, catalog platforms, metadata standards, lineage capture, and metadata enrichment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.526, and AI Governance (AG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for Metadata Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as Metadata Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a Metadata Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
